ast.name: info
ast.source: Skipping internal plugin registration because it is not enabled.
ast.target: 跳过内部插件注册，因为它未启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will add the icon based on the defined rule (as a plain string or in regex format).
ast.target: 将根据定义的规则（以纯字符串或正则表达式格式）添加图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change the style of your emojis.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change the margin of the icons.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change the color of the displayed icons.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change the font size of the displayed icons.
ast.target: 更改显示图标的字体大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change the default icon packs folder path.
ast.target: 更改默认图标包文件夹路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check in the background on every load of Obsidian, if icons are missing and it will try to add them to the specific icon pack.
ast.target: 在每次加载 Obsidian 时在后台检查是否有图标缺失，并尝试将其添加到特定的图标包中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a predefined icon pack that is officially supported.
ast.target: 添加一个官方支持的预定义图标包。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change the limit for the recently used icons displayed in the icon selection modal.
ast.target: 更改图标选择模态框中显示的最近使用图标的限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles the visibility of an icon for a file in the tab bar.
ast.target: 切换标签栏中文件图标的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles the visibility of an icon above the title of a file.
ast.target: 切换文件标题上方图标的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles whether to set the icon based on the frontmatter property `icon`.
ast.target: 切换是否根据 frontmatter 属性 `icon` 设置图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the name of the frontmatter field which contains the icon.
ast.target: 设置包含图标的 frontmatter 字段名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the name of the frontmatter field which contains the icon color.
ast.target: 设置包含图标颜色的 frontmatter 字段名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the icon and color for each note in the vault based on the frontmatter properties. WARNING: This will change any manually set icons to the one defined in the frontmatter. IF A NOTE HAS NO FRONTMATTER, THE CURRENT ICON WILL BE REMOVED. Please restart Obsidian after this completes to see the changes.
ast.target: 根据 frontmatter 属性为库中的每个笔记设置图标和颜色。警告：这将把任何手动设置的图标更改为 frontmatter 中定义的图标。如果笔记没有 frontmatter，当前图标将被移除。完成后请重启 Obsidian 以查看更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles whether you are able to add and see icons in your notes and editor (e.g., ability to have :LiSofa: as an icon in your notes).
ast.target: 切换是否可以在笔记和编辑器中添加和查看图标（例如，在笔记中使用 :LiSofa: 作为图标）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles whether you are able to see icons in the links to other notes
ast.target: 切换是否可以在指向其他笔记的链接中查看图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change the icon identifier used in notes.
ast.target: 更改笔记中使用的图标标识符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle debug mode to see more detailed logs in the console. Do not touch this unless you know what you are doing.
ast.target: 切换调试模式以在控制台中查看更详细的日志。除非你清楚自己在做什么，否则不要触碰此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles whether to try to add icons to the bookmark and outline internal plugins.
ast.target: 切换是否尝试为书签和大纲内部插件添加图标。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 最近使用的图标数量限制

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在前置元数据中使用图标

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 前置元数据图标字段名

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 前置元数据图标颜色字段名

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从前置元数据刷新图标

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 正则表达式或简单字符串

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 降低自定义规则的优先级

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Set color to the default one

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Link element does not have an `href` attribute
ast.target: 链接元素没有 `href` 属性

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Link element does not have a linkpath to a file
ast.target: 链接元素没有指向文件的链接路径

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please delete your old icon packs and redownload your icon packs to use the new syncing mechanism.
ast.target: 请删除旧的图标包并重新下载图标包以使用新的同步机制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Done. This change requires a restart of Obsidian
ast.target: 完成。此更改需要重启 Obsidian

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You need to reload Obsidian for this to take effect.
ast.target: 您需要重新加载 Obsidian 才能生效。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Include folders and files that are part of the path.
ast.target: 包含路径中的文件夹和文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Where the custom rule gets applied to.
ast.target: 自定义规则应用的位置。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 文件/文件夹图标自定义
